personality: 1 iOS-Native Clean structure fused with Hand-Drawn warmth and color restraint
personality_one_liner: Warm, trustworthy, and organized—providing restrained guidance without preaching.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room for readability (especially for Chinese-English mixed text). Use standard scales to pad cards inside columns to keep them from hugging screen edges.

do's: Sticky feedback/action sheets in Tasks and Chat screens

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: A calming, organized feed displaying daily tips, hot news, and product recommendations with direct 'Ask AI' integration.

states.empty: Subtle empty state illustration with 'No updates today'.
states.error: Restrained red 'Failed to load feed' with a retry button.

screens.layout: Vertical scroll feed. Use edge-to-edge column layout with 'lg' padding. Cards have a unified 12px (md) border radius, light '#E7E5E4' borders, and NO shadows. Distinguish cards visually by tags and icons: '科普' (Daily Tips, neutral tone, book icon), '热点' (Hot News, flame icon), '推荐' (Product Rec, clearly tagged). Each card includes a prominent 'Ask AI' CTA.

screens.name: AI Chat
screens.purpose: A contextual conversation space with predefined paths, image uploads, and actionable transitions.

states.empty: Predefined conversation starter prompts in brandTertiary chips.
states.error: Inline error bubble with retry arrow.

screens.layout: Standard chat interface. AI bubbles left-aligned in 'surfaceTertiary' (#F5F5F4). User bubbles right-aligned in 'brandPrimary' (#FF7A59). Include image upload preview support. When AI suggests an action, display a distinct 'Transition Card' that links to task generation.

screens.name: Tasks
screens.purpose: Manage actionable parenting goals with satisfying completion feedback and emoji reflection.

states.loading: Skeleton loaders for task list items.
states.empty: Illustration showing a clean slate with 'All caught up!'.
states.error: Error loading tasks, pull to refresh.

screens.layout: Top segmented control (Today / This Week). Task cards feature a checkbox (with checked animation), title, and source attribution. 'This Week' tasks have a progress bar. Upon checking off a task, trigger a Bottom Sheet feedback modal prompting emoji reflection (😊😐😣), followed by a brief insight tip.

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: Manage family info with a high emphasis on privacy and trust.

states.empty: No child added, show 'Add Child' hero card.

screens.layout: List-based settings layout. Highlight child info cards (nickname, age, allergies) using 'surfaceSecondary' with borders. Prominently display privacy settings toggles (trust-building). Include a clear, non-destructive looking 'Delete all data' button.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the user's color palette: primary is warm coral/orange (#FF7A59), avoiding clinical blues.
Icons must strictly be 'Ionicons outline'—do not use filled versions except for active tab bar states.
Cards MUST NOT use shadows. Use 12px (md) rounded corners and a light border (#E7E5E4) to separate them from the off-white background (#FAFAF9).
Support Chinese-English mixed reading smoothly; prioritize Chinese titles but retain English terms (e.g., GPA, IEP) without awkward line breaks.
Chat screen requires distinct color coding: AI left (light gray) and User right (warm coral). Incorporate a 'thinking' animation for AI responses.
Implement the task completion flow carefully: checking a task triggers an animation, followed by a bottom sheet modal for emoji reflection (😊😐😣).
The Profile page must prominently feature privacy toggles to build trust for NA Chinese families, avoiding any hidden tracking UI.
Avoid childish cartoon styles. Aim for a restrained, trustworthy, and warm editorial feel similar to a high-end journal or modern parenting tool.
